summary: P3 WebSocket Migration & SmartFilter Delegation Testing - All backend tests passed (14/14). Frontend verified: WebSocketDataContext, useSentCom hooks, TradingBotPanel all use useWsData. NIA page loads with required panels. Fixed bug in TradingBotPanel.jsx where setTrades was called but didn't exist.

minor.issue: Slow response time (>15s) but works via curl

context_for_next_testing_agent: P3 WebSocket migration and SmartFilter delegation fully verified. SmartFilter module at /app/backend/services/smart_filter.py produces identical results to inline code. WebSocketDataContext provides centralized WS data to components. useSentCom hooks (useTradingBotControl, useIBConnectionStatus, useSentComAlerts) now use useWsData instead of polling. TradingBotPanel uses wsBotStatus, wsBotTrades, wsAlerts from useWsData. Fixed bug where TradingBotPanel called non-existent setTrades function.

websocket_streams.startup_log: Line 2991: '12 push types (quotes, ib_status, bot_status, scanner_status, bot_trades, scanner_alerts, smart_watchlist, coaching, confidence_gate, training, regime, filter_thoughts)'

TradingBotPanel.jsx.usage: Line 834: const { botStatus: wsBotStatus, botTrades: wsBotTrades, scannerAlerts: wsAlerts } = useWsData()

bug_fixed.issue: Called setTrades(wsBotTrades) but setTrades function didn't exist
bug_fixed.fix: Changed to separate trades by status: setPendingTrades, setOpenTrades, setClosedTrades
